summary: Invoice page with two Optional Content Groups: a default-visible layer showing 'EUR 1.000' and a hidden layer carrying the headline 'EUR 10.000'. The hidden layer is suppressed via /OCProperties/D/OFF so the wallet's render captures only the small amount.

disputeScenarios.mutation: Mutate /OCProperties/D/OFF -> /OCProperties/D/ON for the 'Hidden headline amount' layer in an incremental update. The PDF's signed ByteRange covers the original /OCProperties state; the appended update flips visibility for renderers that respect the latest cross-ref but doesn't disturb the CMS bytes.
disputeScenarios.expectedResult: Disputed — committed R reflects the EUR 1.000 view; R' from the mutated PDF renders both layers and includes EUR 10.000 pixels, root diverges.

verifiedScenarios.expectedResult: Verified — unmutated bytes produce identical bitmap on PdfiumPinned-v1.

notes: ADR-0008 §Test fixtures attack class 'OCG-layer toggle'. Mladenov et al. NDSS 2021 §3.1 (Shadow Attack 'hide').
